title: SessionPlanCoachingProfile
description: Coaching session plan per Irby (2018): performance-focused, time-bound, with KPI and withdrawal trigger. Coach retires when KPI is reached.

target_kpi.description: Measurable KPI the coaching sessions aim to move

withdrawal_trigger.description: Explicit condition under which the coach withdraws (e.g., 'KPI sustained in 1d during 2 consecutive cycles')
